
[source layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F14 main.tex — \degreeYear missing or empty (required: \degreeYear{...} with a non-empty argument)
      fix: Set the missing metadata macro with a non-empty value in main.tex.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f14--required-metadata-macros-set
    [must-fix] UF-F14 main.tex — \degreeMonth missing or empty (required: \degreeMonth{...} with a non-empty argument)
      fix: Set the missing metadata macro with a non-empty value in main.tex.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f14--required-metadata-macros-set
    [must-fix] UF-F14 main.tex — \major missing or empty (required: \major{...} with a non-empty argument)
      fix: Set the missing metadata macro with a non-empty value in main.tex.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f14--required-metadata-macros-set
    [must-fix] UF-F14 main.tex — \chair missing or empty (required: \chair{...} with a non-empty argument)
      fix: Set the missing metadata macro with a non-empty value in main.tex.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f14--required-metadata-macros-set

Summary: 4 must-fix, 0 review.

---
Note: Advisory (not a finding): The ufdissertation template produces untagged PDFs (no /StructTreeRoot, /MarkInfo, or /Lang entries). PDF/UA accessibility features such as tag structure, alt-text, table-header semantics, and reading order are therefore outside the scope of this tool's verification. This is a known template limitation, not a violation detected in your submission.
